---
species: "Unknown green fleshy crust"
accepted_code: "UGFC"
alternate_codes: "UFAC" # "CODE" for single or ["CODE1", "CODE2"] for >1
diminutive: #"CODE" # uncomment and fill in if one exists
alternate_diminutives: # "CODE" for single or ["CODE1", "CODE2"] for >1
common_name: "green fleshy crust"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Any non-calcerous green encrusting algae" # make sure to fill this in!
image: '/header_images/unknown_gfc.jpg'
categories:
  - green algae
  - unknown
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 801
---

![](/header_images/unknown_gfc.jpg')

PHOTO CREDIT:https://theoutershores.com/bio/animals-plants-and-algae/marine-algae/green-algae-chlorophyta/

**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** Fleshy/spongey to the touch. Green looking in color. Grows synonymous to rocks, can be bumpy or flat.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** UFAC

<br/>

**Extended Description:** If you can't delineate color, use UFAC.

<!-- link to worms page -->
